puzzle.hint: They can be found in the heavens, the earth, and within yourself.
puzzle.arabicVerse: وَمِنْ ءَايَـٰتِهِۦٓ أَنْ خَلَقَكُم مِّن تُرَابٍۢ ثُمَّ إِذَآ أَنتُم بَشَرٌۭ تَنتَشِرُونَ
puzzle.verse: 30:20 — And of His signs is that He created you from dust; then, suddenly you were human beings dispersing [throughout the earth].
